Title: Build a React E-commerce Dashboard
Brief Description: Develop a comprehensive admin dashboard for an e-commerce platform using React, Node.js, and MongoDB with real-time analytics and order management.
Background: We're building a modern e-commerce platform that needs a powerful admin dashboard for store owners to manage products, orders, customers, and view analytics. The dashboard should be responsive, user-friendly, and provide real-time insights into business performance.
Objectives: Create a responsive React admin dashboard
Develop secure user authentication and authorization
Create product and inventory management interface

Step-by-Step Instructions.instruction:
Project Setup and Architecture: 
 - Set up React project with TypeScript 
 - Configure routing with React Router 
 - Set up state management with Redux Toolkit 
 - Configure build tools (Webpack/Vite) 
 - Set up ESLint and Prettier for code quality

Authentication System: 
 - Implement JWT-based authentication 
 - Create login/logout functionality 
 - Set up role-based access control (Admin, Manager, Staff) 
 - Implement password reset functionality 
 - Add session management and security

Dashboard Layout and Navigation: 
 - Design responsive sidebar navigation 
 - Create header with user profile and notifications 
 - Implement breadcrumb navigation 
 - Design main content area with grid layout 
 - Add mobile-responsive design

Analytics and Reporting: 
 - Create sales analytics dashboard with charts 
 - Implement real-time order tracking 
 - Build customer analytics and insights 
 - Create inventory and stock reports 
 - Add export functionality for reports

Order Management System: 
 - Build order listing with filtering and search 
 - Create detailed order view and editing 
 - Implement order status updates 
 - Add order fulfillment tracking 
 - Create customer communication system

Technical Requirements.Frontend: React 18+, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, React Router, Material-UI or Tailwind CSS
Technical Requirements.APIs: RESTful API design, WebSocket for real-time updates
Other: Responsive design for mobile and desktop
Data visualization with Chart.js or D3.js

Quality Standards: Responsive design that works on all devices
Fast loading times and optimized performance
Comprehensive error handling and user feedback
Review Checklist: Code follows best practices and conventions
Responsive design works on all screen sizes
